snapshot_boundary: single fixture snapshot; no live store replay
mount_policy: public-safe source notes only; no raw private sources
deletion_obligations: remove derived page if source note is withdrawn
rollback_or_deletion_closure: withdraw derived page if source note is withdrawn; not tested against a store
consumer_policy: May be used as a fixture-level transaction example only; not as evidence of live memory-store behavior.
promotion_blockers: deletion closure over derivatives not tested
replay_boundary: Fixture records the declared transaction shape only; it does not replay a memory store.
non_claims: does not prove deletion closure over a live store
